characters.name: Carran Voss
characters.notes: Grace-Sworn initiate. Earnest. Believes in the compact harder than anyone born to it.

characters.name: Mira Dune
characters.notes: Compact Guild courier. Knows every back street in Hartstone. Loyalties unclear.

characters.name: Sera Eld
characters.notes: Temple healer from outside Hartstone. Came to study the Grace-Sworn. Stayed.

characters.name: Osric Fell
characters.notes: Kelrath Academy scholar. Officially studying civic law. Unofficially watching everything.
